name: Four Herb Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Better for Bread Flour (it does make a difference)
recipeInstructions: This recipe works well in the large size loaf machines. I have a Dak R2D2 machine. If you don't have the herbs called for, you can substitute whatever herbs you like. Put all the ingredients together in the order listed (if using a dak) or in the order your machine prefers. Select the white bread setting and a medium crust setting. Depending on your climate, you may need to add an additional tablespoon of water. I usually use Gluten, but when I first made this with gluten it exploded over the top of the pan and onto the dome. So I don't include gluten in the recipe. It seems that using less flour (B) results in a different texture for the breads.
